channel.title: GitHub CSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CSS in GitHub

item.title: IBM/plex
item.description: The package of IBM’s typeface, IBM Plex.

item.title: micro-zoe/micro-app
item.description: A simple, efficient and powerful micro front-end framework. 一款简约、高效、功能强大的微前端框架

item.title: devicons/devicon
item.description: Set of icons representing programming languages, designing & development tools

item.title: spicetify/spicetify-themes
item.description: A community-driven collection of themes for customizing Spotify through Spicetify - https://github.com/spicetify/cli

item.title: primefaces/primereact
item.description: The Most Complete React UI Component Library

item.title: bradtraversy/50projects50days
item.description: 50+ mini web projects using HTML, CSS & JS

item.title: barryclark/jekyll-now
item.description: Build a Jekyll blog in minutes, without touching the command line.

item.title: aws-samples/amplify-next-template
item.description: This is a Next.js starter for building a fullstack app with AWS Amplify.

item.title: mingw-w64/mingw-w64.github.io
item.description: mingw-w64.net web page contents (The new web page)
